The Palace is a place where people are satisfied in the [[having mode]] and thus are not challenged in their lives.<ref name=":02">{{Citation|title=Reacting to the Meaning Crisis 13 Spiralling|url=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eJzYzZUoJ3c|access-date=2022-11-15|language=en}}</ref>

It is superficially good but harms spiritual development. See the [[Rich Man]].

[[The Buddha]] was in the palace for the beginning of his life and left to seek enlightenment. [[Marcus Aurelius]] said it was possible to be happy even in a palace.<ref name=":02" />

== Modern relevance ==
Might reflect most modern life aside from people with childhood trauma. 

Or geneeral privilege

== References ==

[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[sn:The Palace]][[Category:Forgetting]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
